nodes.title: Create GitHub PR
nodes.description: POST /api/integrations/github/pr with {title, head, base, body}. Creates pull request on GitHub. Returns {number, url, state}. Uses GITHUB_TOKEN.

nodes.title: Get GitHub PR Status
nodes.description: GET /api/integrations/github/pr/:number. Returns {number, title, state, merged, checks: []}. Shows CI status checks.

nodes.title: List GitHub Issues
nodes.description: GET /api/integrations/github/issues. Returns array of {number, title, state, labels}. Filters by state (open/closed).

nodes.title: Create GitLab MR
nodes.description: POST /api/integrations/gitlab/mr with {title, sourceBranch, targetBranch, description}. Creates merge request on GitLab. Returns {iid, url, state}. Uses GITLAB_TOKEN.

nodes.title: Get GitLab MR Status
nodes.description: GET /api/integrations/gitlab/mr/:iid. Returns {iid, title, state, merged, pipelines: []}. Shows pipeline status.

nodes.title: List GitLab Issues
nodes.description: GET /api/integrations/gitlab/issues. Returns array of {iid, title, state, labels}. Filters by state (opened/closed).

nodes.title: Create Codeberg MR
nodes.description: POST /api/integrations/codeberg/mr with {title, sourceBranch, targetBranch, description}. Creates pull request on Codeberg/Forgejo. Returns {id, url, state}. Uses CODEBERG_TOKEN.

nodes.title: Get Codeberg MR Status
nodes.description: GET /api/integrations/codeberg/mr/:id. Returns {id, title, state, merged, checks: []}. Shows CI/pipeline status.

nodes.title: Get Pipeline Status
nodes.description: GET /api/integrations/:provider/pipeline/:id. Returns {id, state, jobs: [], duration, url}. Provider: github, gitlab, codeberg.

nodes.title: Detect Provider
nodes.description: On app startup. Parses git remote URL to detect provider (github, gitlab, codeberg). Returns {provider, owner, repo}.
